description_long: This is a fantasy-style sword featuring a dramatically curved, jagged black blade with a marbled texture, giving it a menacing and mystical appearance. The blade is single-edged and has pronounced, irregular serrations along its cutting edge. The guard is gold-colored, semi-circular, and visually separates the blade from the handle, which is cylindrical and silver with a smooth finish. The pommel is a large, round, white element set with a prominent red gem, adding a decorative and possibly magical touch. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or ornamental weapon rather than a practical tool, with a strong visual emphasis on contrast between the dark blade and the bright handle and guard.
description: A fantasy sword with a jagged, marbled black blade, gold guard, silver handle, and a white pommel set with a red gem. The design is highly decorative and dramatic.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the jagged, marbled black blade, gold guard, and the full profile of the silver handle and white pommel with a red gem.
description_view_1: The edge-on view shows the thinness of the blade and handle, with the gold guard and red gem pommel visible as narrow lines.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the blade's serrated edge, the gold guard, and the cylindrical handle with the white pommel and red gem.
description_view_3: The opposite edge-on view again emphasizes the thin profile, with the gold guard and red gem pommel seen from the side.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, silver, smooth, with a large round white pommel set with a red gem
attribute_ornamentation: red gemstone in pommel, marbled blade texture, gold guard
